'''鈭歸-h-th-m''' ('''kawahthemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:excommunicate|excommunicate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-th-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:excommunicate|excommunicate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-h-th-m
|-
! Lemma
| kawahthemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwahthemoko|thiwahthemoko]] || [[word:jiwahthemoko|jiwahthemoko]] || [[word:shiwahthemoko|shiwahthemoko]] || [[word:kiwahthemoko|kiwahthemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
